'''Sturdimoss''' was a [[Moss/Legends|moss]] that was used as a living carpet for the large [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] atrium known as the [[Morning Court]], which was located in the [[New Jedi Temple]] on the<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Inferno" /> [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. As the secret [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] left the Morning Court to join the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance's]] [[Fourth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fourth Fleet]], the heels of his [[Boot/Legends|boots]] dug into the sturdimoss floor.<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Inferno" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sturdimoss appeared in the [[2007]] novel ''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'', written by [[Troy Denning]].<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Inferno" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st|[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno (abridged audiobook)|audiobook]]}}
